name: The World of Splatoon   (Old)
description:
I'm working on a overhaul for this so if ya wanna have a better experience wait a bit ;3

A RPG sent in the World of Splatoon including *Eventually* all Characters, Vendors and Places. The Characters Available at the Moment are Marie, Callie, Pearl, Marina, Shiver, Frye, Big Man, Mr. Grizz, Agent 3 / Captain, Sheldon, Judd, Lil' Judd Harmony, Acht, Agent 4 and DJ Octavio. Most Places like Inkopolis, The Splatlands, Octo Canyon/Vally and The Deepsea Metro are also here. **Newest Update**: Updates to Acht, Cuttlefish and Lil' Judd This bot is not finished yet and more characters will be added soon All Feedback and suggestions are appreciated :3 **Next Stuff to be Added**: Agent 8, Murch *Its gettin harder and harder adding stuff because around 3200 tokens the thing just beguns to speak nonsense.* *Tags: Splatoon, Splatoon 2, Splatoon 3, Splatoon 2: Octo Expansion. Marie, Callie, Squid Sisters, Off The Hook. Roleplay*
creator: Algonso
